column1: # --- Canopy escape probability per band (the key Tier-2 comparison metric) ---

column4: escape fraction for SIF_red = sif_hemis_band_red / sif_emitted_band_red
escape fraction for SIF_farred = sif_hemis_band_farred / sif_emitted_band_farred
